title: Forsaken Items
description: This is an interesting accessory mod that adds a variety of accessories to Minecraft.
body:
The "Forgotten Items" mod introduces a variety of new unique items and tools into the game, which can only be crafted through unique methods. These items have no standard crafting recipes—instead, their recipes change dynamically based on the world you're in. This means you’ll never know what materials are required to craft them until after creating the world.

To discover these recipes, players must read runes, which can be found in loot chests scattered throughout the world. By tying progression to exploration and decoding, the mod adds a fresh layer of grind and discovery to the gameplay experience.
